Operation 'createChatCompletion' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks critical input details (message format, key parameters like temperature/max_tokens, model selection) and output details (response structure, finish reasons, token usage). Added specifics about message roles, parameter options, streaming behavior, and response composition to improve AI agent understanding of what to send and what to expect.

data.current_description: Generate a chat completion response given a list of messages forming a conversation. Supports streaming, function calling, and structured output.
data.description_suggestion: Generate a chat completion response from a conversation history of messages. Accepts a list of messages with roles (system, user, assistant) and optional parameters for model selection, temperature, max tokens, and tool definitions. Supports streaming responses, function/tool calling, and structured output generation. Returns a completion choice with the generated message, finish reason, and token usage statistics. Requires Bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical input details (message format, key parameters like temperature/max_tokens, model selection) and output details (response structure, finish reasons, token usage). Added specifics about message roles, parameter options, streaming behavior, and response composition to improve AI agent understanding of what to send and what to expect.

message: Operation 'createEmbedding' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is vague about input format (single string vs. batch), output structure (what embedding objects contain), and response composition. Added clarity on accepted input types, embedding vector format, response structure including token usage, and authentication requirement for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Generate embedding vectors for the given input text using a specified embeddings model. Compatible with OpenAI's embeddings API format.
data.description_suggestion: Generate embedding vectors for input text using a specified embeddings model. Accepts text input (string or array of strings) and model identifier. Returns an array of embedding objects, each containing a vector of numerical values representing the semantic meaning of the input text, along with token usage statistics. Compatible with OpenAI's embeddings API format. Requires Bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about input format (single string vs. batch), output structure (what embedding objects contain), and response composition. data.current_description: Generate a text completion for the given prompt. Supports streaming and structured output.
data.description_suggestion: Generate text completion(s) for a given prompt using a specified model. Accepts a text prompt and optional parameters including model selection, temperature, max tokens, number of completions, and stop sequences.
